title: Tab TPS
description: Shows the server performance in TAB
body:
# Tab Tps - ![TabTps Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/tab-tps)

This mod offers showing the TPS & MSPT to operators. _(permission level >= 2)_

This mod could do way more but I wanted a very light weight and simple option for this single feature.

I wanted the `/log tps` command from Carpet Mod but without Carpet mod, so I made this!

## Commands
- **/tabtps toggle** - Toggles the display per user on/off
- **/tabtps mode** - Toggles the mode it shows, Average or Instant
   - Average: Shows the tps average from the last 10 seconds
   - Instant: Shows the tps for the current second

It defaults off and in average mode

## Visual Example
![TabTps Visual Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cjyc01nq/images/e4ba45ae11e5233d2f577fae4ffb5635fcf5b36a.png)
